mapper.select: SELECT id, code, name, logo_url, status, created_at, updated_at FROM airline WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM airline WHERE code = #{code}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO airline(code, name, logo_url, status) VALUES(#{code}, #{name}, #{logoUrl}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE airline SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
